## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `test` — Adding or updating tests
- [ ] `chore` — Build, CI, or tooling change
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement

## Affected Modules

- [ ] `Core`
- [ ] `NetworkLayer`
- [ ] `StorageLayer`
- [ ] `MapFeature`
- [ ] `ARFeature`
- [ ] `AILayer`
- [ ] App Target (iOS / macOS / visionOS)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows [naming convention](../CONTRIBUTING.md#branch-naming-convention) (`feature/`, `bugfix/`, etc.)
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-message-convention)
- [ ] SwiftLint passes with zero violations
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New `public` APIs have `///` documentation
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] Builds successfully on all targets (iOS, macOS, visionOS)
